2603.19005.title: AgentDS Technical Report: Benchmarking the Future of Human-AI Collaboration in Domain-Specific Data Science
2603.19005.paper_summary: Data science plays a critical role in transforming complex data into actionable insights across numerous domains. Recent developments in large language models (LLMs) and artificial intelligence (AI) agents have significantly automated data science workflow. However, it remains unclear to what extent AI agents can match the performance of human experts on domain-specific data science tasks, and in which aspects human expertise continues to provide advantages. We introduce AgentDS, a benchmark and competition designed to evaluate both AI agents and human-AI collaboration performance in domain-specific data science. AgentDS consists of 17 challenges across six industries: commerce, food production, healthcare, insurance, manufacturing, and retail banking. We conducted an open competition involving 29 teams and 80 participants, enabling systematic comparison between human-AI collaborative approaches and AI-only baselines. Our results show that current AI agents struggle with domain-specific reasoning. AI-only baselines perform near or below the median of competition participants, while the strongest solutions arise from human-AI collaboration. These findings challenge the narrative of complete automation by AI and underscore the enduring importance of human expertise in data science, while illuminating directions for the next generation of AI. Visit the AgentDS website here: https://agentds.org/ and open source datasets here: https://huggingface.co/datasets/lainmn/AgentDS .
2603.19005.paper_summary_zh: 資料科學在將複雜數據轉化為可行見解方面扮演著關鍵角色，涵蓋了眾多領域。最近在大型語言模型（LLMs）和人工智慧（AI）代理方面的發展已顯著自動化了資料科學工作流程。然而，目前尚不清楚AI代理在特定領域的資料科學任務中能在多大程度上匹配人類專家的表現，以及在人類專業知識仍然提供優勢的哪些方面。我們介紹了AgentDS，一個旨在評估AI代理和人類-AI協作在特定領域資料科學中的表現的基準和競賽。AgentDS包含來自六個行業的17個挑戰：商業、食品生產、醫療保健、保險、製造業和零售銀行。我們舉辦了一場開放競賽，參與者包括29個團隊和80名參賽者，使人類-AI協作方法與僅AI基準之間的系統比較成為可能。我們的結果顯示，目前的AI代理在特定領域的推理上存在困難。僅AI基準的表現接近或低於競賽參賽者的中位數，而最強的解決方案來自人類-AI的協作。這些發現挑戰了AI完全自動化的敘事，並強調了人類專業知識在資料科學中的持久重要性，同時為下一代AI指明了方向。訪問AgentDS網站：https://agentds.org/，以及開源數據集：https://huggingface.co/datasets/lainmn/AgentDS。
2603.19005.author: An Luo et.al.
2603.19005.authors: An Luo, Jin Du, Xun Xian, Robert Specht, Fangqiao Tian, Ganghua Wang, Xuan Bi, Charles Fleming, Ashish Kundu, Jayanth Srinivasa, Mingyi Hong, Rui Zhang, Tianxi Li, Galin Jones, Jie Ding
